sourceFindings.finding: Generic chart fallback now says what the chart points to, expected behavior, support, pressure, current action, and evidence limits.
Calculation-limited charts are marked as topic markers and cannot invent support, delay, timing, or life results.
Report bullets now use prediction, support, pressure, practical action, premium prediction depth, evidence anchor, and evidence appendix.
User-facing label changed from governs-first copy to what this points to now.
Predicta replies open with direct prediction signal and evidence focus, then expose support, free understanding, premium depth, and evidence appendix.

removed: Every chart now opens with human meaning first.

bannedCopyAudit.allowedTechnicalUse: The internal field name governs remains in shared types as metadata, but it is no longer presented as the primary value proposition.

freePremiumRule.free: Concise, useful, non-technical prediction with support, pressure, active theme, and practical action.
freePremiumRule.premium: Deeper evidence, contradictions, timing relevance, cross-chart synthesis, and report-grade practical guidance.
